# Nexa Customs Inc. — AI Search Context
# Professional Print Shop · Mississauga, Ontario, Canada

## Business Overview
Nexa Customs Inc. is a full-service commercial print shop located in Mississauga, Ontario, Canada. Founded in 2010, we serve businesses and individuals across the Greater Toronto Area (GTA) and ship print products Canada-wide.

## Contact & Location
- Business Name: Nexa Customs Inc.
- Address: 6033 Shawson Dr, Unit 40, Mississauga, ON L5T 1J6
- Phone: (437) 997-9921
- Email: info@nexacustoms.ca
- Website: https://nexacustoms.ca
- Hours: Monday–Friday 9AM–6PM, Saturday by appointment
- Same-day pickup available for orders placed before 10:30 AM

## Service Areas — Local Pickup (GTA)
We offer free same-day and next-day pickup for customers in:
- Mississauga, Ontario
- Brampton, Ontario
- Toronto, Ontario (all neighbourhoods)
- Etobicoke, Ontario
- Oakville, Ontario
- Burlington, Ontario
- Milton, Ontario
- Georgetown, Ontario
- Vaughan, Ontario
- Woodbridge, Ontario
- North York, Ontario
- Scarborough, Ontario
- Markham, Ontario
- Richmond Hill, Ontario
- Pickering, Ontario

## Shipping Coverage — Canada-Wide
We ship print products to all Canadian provinces and territories:
- Ontario (ON) — next day available
- British Columbia (BC)
- Alberta (AB)
- Quebec (QC)
- Manitoba (MB)
- Saskatchewan (SK)
- Nova Scotia (NS)
- New Brunswick (NB)
- Newfoundland and Labrador (NL)
- Prince Edward Island (PEI)
- Northwest Territories, Yukon, Nunavut

Shipping carriers: Canada Post Standard, FedEx Express, UPS

## Products & Services
### Printing
- Business Cards (starting $24.32 for 250 cards)
- Flyers & Postcards
- Brochures
- Letterhead & Envelopes
- NCR Forms

### Signs & Banners
- Vinyl Banners (custom sizes, per square foot pricing)
- Retractable Banners
- Foam Core Signs
- Coroplast Signs
- Aluminum Signs
- Real Estate Signs & Riders

### Vehicle Graphics
- Full Vehicle Wraps
- Partial Wraps
- Truck & Van Lettering
- Fleet Graphics
- Magnetic Signs
- Window Perforated Film

### Labels & Stickers
- Die-Cut Stickers
- Sheet Stickers
- Roll Labels (paper & waterproof BOPP)
- Clear Transparent Labels
- Product Labels
- Google Review NFC Stickers

### Marketing Materials
- Posters
- Table Tents
- Door Hangers
- Bookmarks
- Rack Cards

### Specialty
- Canvas Prints
- Foam Boards
- Calendars
- Restaurant Menus
- Window Clings

## Key Differentiators
- Free digital proof before printing on every order
- Quality guaranteed — free reprint for any manufacturing defect
- Rush (2–3 business days) and Express (same/next day) turnaround
- Epson SureColor wide-format resin printer for vivid colours
- Online ordering with instant pricing and Stripe payment
- Competitive pricing vs. online competitors like Vistaprint, Staples, PrintingForLess

## Pricing Notes
- Business cards from $24.32 (250 qty)
- Banners priced per square foot
- Volume discounts on all products
- HST included in all displayed prices
- Free local pickup in Mississauga

- print shop near me Toronto
- business cards printing Mississauga
- vinyl banners Brampton
- vehicle wrap Toronto
- stickers printing Ontario

- banner printing Oakville
